_comment: The locked aidemo matte-clay house style, read by the blog-engine hero lane (images.styles → this file; images.defaultStyle: matte-clay). Originally extracted from the retired blog/scripts/hero_images.mjs (see git history). aidemo semantics: the article's hero.subject is substituted for {subject} inside the pos wrapper — only the subject varies, the style never does. Rendered at 1216x832 (native SDXL landscape bucket = the bake's hero aspect), seed = fnv1a(slug)+seedOffset from data/hero-subjects.json.

matte-clay.pos: minimalist matte clay 3D scene of {subject}, soft rounded shapes, smooth studio render, plain dark charcoal background, coral orange and violet purple rim lighting, gentle top light, soft shadows, high detail, wide cinematic composition
matte-clay.neg: text, words, letters, numbers, logos, labels, screens, user interface, watermark, person, face, hands, photo, photorealistic, blurry, low quality, deformed
